mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_chat_message (session_id, role, content, sources, intent_type, token_count, created_at) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{sources}, #{intentType}, #{tokenCount}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, role, content, sources, intent_type, token_count, created_at FROM ai_chat_message WHERE id = #{id}
